description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 Porsche Cayenne S, 4.0 TC V8, AWD, 468bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 499,000 or AED 7,817 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 5,850 KM - Porsche Warranty Until August 2029 (Extendable) - Porsche Service Contract Until August 2029 (4 Services) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Quartzite Grey Metallic - Leather Interior in Two-Tone Black and Bramble - 22” 911 Turbo Design Wheel with Wheel Arch Extensions in Exterior Colour - Comfort Seats in Front (14-Way, Electric) with Memory Package - Seat Heating (Front) - Seat Ventilation (Front & Rear) - Exterior Package in Black (High-Gloss) - SportDesign Front Apron - ‘PORSCHE’ Logo LED Door Courtesy Lights - Sport Chrono Package - Sports Exhaust System incl. Sport Tailpipes in Silver - HD-Matrix LED Headlights - Thermally Insulated Glass (Front) - Carbon Interior Package - Porsche Crest on Headrests - Heated Multifunction GT Sports Steering Wheel Leather with Inlay in Carbon - Lane Change Assist - Adaptive Cruise Control - Passenger Display - Burmester 3D High-End Surround Sound System
